Module com.example.progettosw
Package model.objectives

Class ObjectiveCountingGold

java.lang.Object
model.objectives.ObjectiveCountingGold
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Objective, Points
public class ObjectiveCountingGold extends Object implements Objective, Points, Serializable
This class an objective that requires to count the gold cards

      public int countObjectivePoints(PlayingStation station)
      Specified by:
      countObjectivePoints in interface Objective
      Parameters:
      station - is the station where we want to count the points
      Returns:
      the points of the objective

    • countObjectivePoints

      public int countObjectivePoints(PlayingStation station, CardResource card, Integer x, Integer y)
      Specified by:
      countObjectivePoints in interface Points
      Parameters:
      station - is the station where we want to count the points
      card - is the card we want to place(in this case we don't need it)
      x - is the position(in this case we don't need it)
      y - is the position(in this case we don't need it)
      Returns:
      the points of the objective this function is used to count the points of the objective and also to count the points of a gold card
